race.description: Bet365 Same Race Multi Highweight Maiden Plate
race.comment: WHICH FLOOR (8) found one better beaten 2.3L over 1600m at Kilmore. Worked home steadily and this suits. He just has to manage the outside barrier to take beating. LADY COLONIST (10) needs to find a bit more but is third up and comes back to country level. Has a handy gate and will get every chance.  BADJAWA (5), who produced a fair effort at Wangaratta over 1590m on debut. Maps for a soft run and quick improvement is on the cards. In good hands and comes right into calculations. LUCKY CHANCE (1) was never in the picture at Mor first-up. Has had two trials over the sticks since and the step up in the trip suits. He looks the best of the remainder.
